name: Living in Sim | 360 3D Movie | Do We Live in a Simulation? | Comedy, Horror

reviews.review_description:
This felt like being inside a modern version of an episode of Bottom :D

I've only gone through it once, I'll probably try again in a few days to see what happens when I choose a different path. All in all a good 40 minutes of fun.

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed it. My brother loves Bottom... And I definitely get the similarities :D

reviews.review_description: Vote Republican.... Stay straut... produce children...piss on Biden.

developer_response.body:
Don't know if this is spam because of the political comments...

Some people have had issues downloading the content and need to go to Settings -> Power -> Sleep Mode -> adjust to 4 hours.  Sleep mode cancels the ~7GB download and is usually set to 15 minutes.

Adjust sleep mode then put headset onto charge while downloading and have a coffee and a smoke to get you in the right mood. 

Check on it every 5/10 minutes and make sure it is still downloading. If it fails again, it will save what has already downloaded so redownloading shouldn't take as long.
